hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE"); case "$BASENAME" in detekt.yml|build.gradle.kts|settings.gradle.kts|.golangci.yml|biome.json|.oxlintrc.json|tsconfig.json|buf.yaml|Makefile) echo "BLOCK: lint/build config change requires ADR" >&2; exit 1;; .env|.env.local|.env.production|.env.staging|.env.development|credentials.json|secrets.yml|secrets.yaml|*.pem|*.key|*.p12|*.pfx) echo "BLOCK: secret file edit blocked" >&2; exit 1;; esac'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM|git push --force|git reset --hard)"; then echo "BLOCK: destructive command blocked" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "--no-verify"; then echo "BLOCK: --no-verify blocked" >&2; exit 2; fi'
